adhoc.description: If the query wasn't explcitly saved

calculations.description: Create Calculations to compute as part of the query.

datasets.description: Set the Datasets to query. Leave it empty to query all the datasets.

filterCombination.description: Set a Flag to describe how to combine the filters on the query.

filters.description: Configure the Filters to apply to the query. Supports nested groups via kind: 'group'.

anyOf.description: A filter condition applied to query results. Use the keys and values endpoints to discover available fields and their values before constructing filters.

key.description: Filter field name. Use verified keys from previous query results or the keys endpoint. Common keys include $metadata.service, $metadata.origin, $metadata.trigger, $metadata.message, and $metadata.error.

kind.description: Discriminator for leaf filter nodes. Always 'filter' when present; may be omitted.

operation.description: Comparison operator. String operators: includes, not_includes, starts_with, ends_with, regex. Existence: exists, is_null. Set membership: in, not_in (comma-separated values). Numeric: eq, neq, gt, gte, lt, lte.

type.description: Data type of the filter field. Must match the actual type of the key being filtered.

value.description: Comparison value. Must match actual values in your data — verify with the values endpoint. Ensure the value type (string/number/boolean) matches the field type. String comparisons are case-sensitive. Regex uses RE2 syntax (no lookaheads/lookbehinds).

groupBys.description: Define how to group the results of the query.

havings.description: Configure the Having clauses that filter on calculations in the query result.

limit.description: Set a limit on the number of results / records returned by the query

needle.description: Define an expression to search using full-text search.

orderBy.description: Configure the order of the results returned by the query.

order.description: Set the order of the results

value.description: Configure which Calculation to order the results by.
